name: Pineapple Upside-Down Cakes
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------------CAKE------------------------------------
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter.
2. Beat together 1 large egg and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract with the melted butter until creamy.
3. Add 1/2 cup unsweetened pineapple juice to the mixture; beat thoroughly.
4. Sift in 1 cup white flour, 1/2 teaspoon baking soda, and 1/2 teaspoon baking powder. Beat just until blended.
5. To prepare syrup, drain juice from can of sliced pineapple into a small saucepan. Reserve the pineapple slices for use later.
6. Add pineapple juice concentrate, spices, cornstarch, and butter to the saucepan. Mix well.
7. Stir constantly and bring to a boil over medium heat.
8. Boil 1 minute. Remove from heat, stir in remaining butter, and set aside.
9. Butter 4 glass pyrex baking dishes (approximately 4 inches in diameter) lightly.
10. Spoon 1 tablespoon of syrup into each dish. Place 1 ring of sliced pineapple on top of the syrup in each dish.
11. Pour batter evenly over the pineapple rings in each dish, spreading to smooth surface.
12. Bake at 325 degrees F for 25-30 minutes or until lightly browned.
13. Remove from oven and loosen cake with a sharp knife around the edges.
14. Turn each baking dish upside-down onto individual dessert saucers.
15. Serve immediately.
Serves 4.
